docs.title: Welcome to Soirée HK 2026
docs.text: Crafting unforgettable moments in the heart of Hong Kong.

docs.title: Who We Are
docs.text: Soirée HK 2026 is a premier event experience company based in Hong Kong. We design and deliver extraordinary events — from intimate private gatherings to large-scale corporate galas — with meticulous attention to detail and a passion for excellence.

docs.title: What We Do
docs.text: Service Description 🥂 Corporate Events Product launches, award ceremonies, company milestones 🎊 Private Celebrations Birthdays, anniversaries, bespoke social gatherings 🤝 Brand Activations Pop-ups, experiential marketing, curated brand moments 🍽️ Dining Experiences Private dining, themed suppers, chef collaborations

docs.title: Why Choose Us
docs.text:
• Local Expertise — Deep roots in Hong Kong's event scene
  • End-to-End Management — Concept to execution, all under one roof
  • Premium Partnerships — Curated network of venues, caterers, and talent
  • Bespoke Approach — Every event is unique, just like our clients

Get in Touch →{ .md-button .md-button--primary } Our Services →{ .md-button }

docs.title: Our Story
docs.text: Soirée HK 2026 was founded with a singular vision: to bring world-class event experiences to Hong Kong. With a team of seasoned professionals across event production, hospitality, and creative direction, we combine local knowledge with international standards.

docs.title: Our Team
docs.text:
Creative Directors — Visionaries who transform briefs into breathtaking concepts.

Production Specialists — Experts in logistics, AV, lighting, and set design.

Hospitality Curators — Dedicated to flawless guest experiences from arrival to farewell.

Brand Strategists — Ensuring every event communicates your story with purpose.

docs.title: ✨ Excellence
docs.text: We hold ourselves to the highest standards in every detail — from the table centrepiece to the guest list management.

docs.title: 🤝 Integrity
docs.text: Transparent pricing, honest timelines, and reliable delivery — every time.

docs.title: 🎯 Creativity
docs.text: No two events are alike. We push creative boundaries while staying true to your brand and vision.

docs.title: 🌏 Community
docs.text: Proud to support local talent, vendors, and the broader Hong Kong creative economy.

docs.title: Based in Hong Kong
docs.text: Hong Kong is one of Asia's most dynamic cities — and our playground. We know the best venues, the hidden gems, the right partners, and the local nuances that make your event feel authentically HK.

docs.title: Contact Us
docs.text: We'd love to hear about your event. Get in touch and one of our team will respond within 24 hours.

docs.title: 📧 Email
docs.text:
General Enquiries: hello@soiree-hk2026.com

Corporate Events: corporate@soiree-hk2026.com

Private Celebrations: private@soiree-hk2026.com

docs.title: 📍 Location
docs.text:
Soirée HK 2026 Central, Hong Kong SAR

We work with venues across Hong Kong Island, Kowloon, and the New Territories.

docs.title: 🕐 Office Hours
docs.text: Day Hours Monday – Friday 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (HKT) Saturday 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM (HKT) Sunday By appointment

docs.title: 📋 Event Enquiry Checklist
docs.text:
To help us respond quickly, please include in your message:

  • Event type (corporate / private / activation / dining)
  • Approximate guest count
  • Preferred date(s) or timeframe
  • Budget range (optional but helpful)
  • Any specific requirements or ideas

We look forward to creating something extraordinary with you.

docs.title: Upcoming & Recent Events
docs.text: A selection of what we've been working on in 2026.

docs.title: 🗓️ Summer Gala 2026
docs.text:
Date: July 2026 | Type: Corporate Gala | Location: Hong Kong

An exclusive evening for 250 guests celebrating a major financial firm's milestone anniversary. Live jazz, bespoke cocktail menu, and a custom floral installation.

docs.title: 🗓️ Brand Launch — Luxury Retail Pop-Up
docs.text:
Date: June 2026 | Type: Brand Activation | Location: Central, HK

A three-day immersive pop-up for a European luxury brand entering the HK market. Over 1,200 visitors, media coverage in 8 publications.

docs.title: 🗓️ Private Anniversary Dinner
docs.text:
Date: May 2026 | Type: Private Dining | Location: Peak, HK

An intimate 30-guest anniversary dinner with a custom 7-course menu, live string quartet, and rooftop terrace setting.

docs.title: Past Highlights
docs.text:
Year Event Guests 2025 Tech Summit After-Party 400 2025 Charity Gala — Children's Hospital 350 2025 Fashion Brand Launch 200 2024 New Year's Eve Private Celebration 80

"Soirée HK delivered beyond our expectations. Every detail was perfect." — Corporate Client, Financial Services

"Our guests are still talking about it months later." — Private Client, Anniversary Dinner

docs.title: Our Services
docs.text: We offer a full suite of event services, tailored to your goals, brand, and budget.

docs.title: 🥂 Corporate Events
docs.text:
From product launches to year-end galas, we handle everything — venue sourcing, guest management, AV production, catering, and post-event reporting.

Ideal for: Companies, startups, NGOs, international brands entering HK.

docs.title: 🎊 Private Celebrations
docs.text:
Your milestone deserves a bespoke experience. We design private events that reflect your personality, bringing together the finest in food, décor, entertainment, and ambience.

Ideal for: Birthdays, anniversaries, proposals, farewell parties.

docs.title: 🤝 Brand Activations
docs.text:
Make your brand impossible to ignore. We create immersive activations that connect your audience with your story in a meaningful, memorable way.

Ideal for: Retail launches, lifestyle brands, experiential campaigns.

docs.title: 🍽️ Curated Dining Experiences
docs.text:
Exclusive private dining with bespoke menus crafted in collaboration with Hong Kong's top chefs. From intimate dinners for 10 to lavish banquets for 300.

Ideal for: VIP client entertaining, executive dinners, media events.

docs.title: 📦 Full-Service Packages
docs.text:
Package Included Essential Concept, venue, catering coordination Premium Everything in Essential + AV, décor, photography Signature Full bespoke production, talent booking, post-event wrap

Request a Quote →{ .md-button .md-button--primary }
